stories.headline: How the 'Yellowstone effect' transformed one rugged western American city
stories.description: Rents in Bozeman, Montana have skyrocketed as wealthy out-of-towners flock to the city to experience the American West.

stories.headline: Andy Burnham will be bolder but stick to Labour manifesto, Lucy Powell says
stories.description: Kemi Badenoch called Burnham a "people pleaser" before he becomes prime minister on Monday.

stories.headline: Guyana ferry with 116 people on board capsizes; more than 50 rescued
stories.description: Rescue operations for remaining passengers and crew ongoing, authorities say.

stories.headline: Why is India vetting books in Kashmir in search of ‘anti-national’ content?
stories.description: Authorities in disputed region are auditing school, college and public libraries to look for ‘objectionable’ material.

stories.headline: Gaza cheers for Spain as World Cup final anticipation mounts
stories.description: Football fans in Gaza express support for Spain in showdown with Argentina, citing Spanish solidarity with Palestinians.
